verdict: The gold standard of anti-aging serums, Advanced Night Repair combines hyaluronic acid with ChronoluxCB technology to synchronize skin repair overnight. Decades of clinical research support its efficacy for fine lines, uneven tone, and radiance.

_research.name: Estée Lauder Advanced Night Repair Serum
_research.con: Complex fermentation process may cause sensitivities in acne-prone skin.
